sideBranches.name: Black Pit
sideBranches.description: A blasphemous sinkhole where the first warped things still breed.

sideBranches.name: Graveyard Ridge
sideBranches.description: A grave ridge where the dead answer a red-lit call.

sideBranches.name: Ashfall Hamlet
sideBranches.description: The burned remains of a hamlet where the camp sage was last seen.

sideBranches.name: Ruined Watchtower
sideBranches.description: An old signal tower where blood-ledgers and contraband still linger.

sideBranches.name: Collapsed Cisterns
sideBranches.description: Broken waterworks and burial runoff beneath the refuge road.

sideBranches.name: Buried Tomb Entries
sideBranches.description: A cluster of grave doors half-swallowed by the dunes.

sideBranches.name: Worm-Tunnels
sideBranches.description: A living tunnel network cut through the desert's dead weight.

sideBranches.name: Serpent Vaults
sideBranches.description: A sealed reliquary watched by coiled guardians and venom priests.

sideBranches.name: Spider Hollows
sideBranches.description: Low wet caverns webbed over by idol-fed broodmothers.

sideBranches.name: Hunter Village
sideBranches.description: A knife-quiet village where masks, nets, and sacrificial drums still hang.

sideBranches.name: Drowned Causeway
sideBranches.description: A half-submerged processional road leading toward the inner shrines.

sideBranches.name: Icebound River
sideBranches.description: A buried river route frozen beneath the siege roads.

sideBranches.name: White Drift Cavern
sideBranches.description: A wind-carved cave where abandoned sled lines vanish under the snow.

sideBranches.name: Mourning Temple
sideBranches.description: A sealed mountain shrine reopened only after the river crossing is secured.

sideBranches.name: Sorrow Halls
sideBranches.description: The first echoing chambers beneath the old mountain shrine.

sideBranches.name: Ruin Halls
sideBranches.description: A deeper run of frozen corridors where the old oath-line broke.

sideBranches.name: Oathbreaker Vault
sideBranches.description: The traitor's vault at the end of the buried shrine chain.
